content.speakerText: How loud are Cavalier King Charles dogs? I'm in an apartment.
content.speakerTextCn: 卡瓦利尔犬叫得大声吗？我住公寓。
expectedAnswers: They bark occasionally, but it's very soft and rare.
Perfect for apartments; they hardly ever bark.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确回应了公寓住户对噪音的担忧
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确，是否避免了夸张描述
表达自然度：是否使用了口语化表达（如 chill, hardly ever）
关键词覆盖：是否包含 quiet, apartment, bark 等核心词

content.speakerText: Do they need a lot of exercise?
expectedAnswers: Nah, they’re couch potatoes—just a short walk and some cuddles.
Minimal exercise needed; they’re happy with indoor play.
Daily 15-minute walks and a game of fetch are plenty.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否准确传达了低运动需求的特性
语言准确性：是否正确使用了动词搭配（need, take, get）
表达自然度：是否使用了地道口语（如 nah, couch potatoes）
关键词覆盖：是否包含 exercise, walk, play, minimal 等关键词

content.speakerText: Are Cavalier King Charles dogs good for first-time pet owners?
content.speakerTextCn: 卡瓦利尔犬适合新手养宠人士吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, they're easygoing and affectionate—perfect for beginners.
Absolutely! They’re not high-maintenance and bond closely with people.
Great choice—they adapt well to new owners and love attention.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确回答了是否适合新手的问题
语言准确性：是否使用了正确的形容词和动词结构
表达自然度：是否使用了口语化、鼓励性表达（如 perfect, absolutely, great choice）
关键词覆盖：是否包含 beginner, easygoing, affectionate, low-maintenance 等关键词
